arts.ttl: Manchester United star was criticised this season - but has improved without anybody realising
arts.sum: Man Utd defender Diogo Dalot didn't look himself for most of the season but he's quietly improved over the last few weeks.

arts.ttl: ‘Something special’ happened for me to join Manchester United - now I’m plotting their downfall
arts.sum: United take on Lyon in the Europa League quarter-finals and a former Reds star is plotting their demise

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Four-man striker transfer shortlist emerges as Ineos move sparks controversy
arts.sum: Manchester United already have one eye on the summer transfer window when signing a new striker will be among the most important priorities for Ineos and Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Man Utd, Liverpool and Arsenal 'in transfer battle as historic offer lined up'
arts.sum: Boubacar Kamara has become one of Aston Villa's most important players but before Champions League clash with PSG, French media say the midfielder is being watched by a host of top teams

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba speaks out on 'depression' at Man United and thoughts of quitting football
arts.sum: Paul Pogba has opened up with a fresh perspective on his Man United career, his recent 18-month ban and the next club he will play for

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's best is still to come insists Unai Emery - as Aston Villa boss claims exiled Man United star has rediscovered his love of football
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Rashford joined Villa on loan last winter after effectively being exiled by Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim and he is slowly finding his feet again at Villa.
